summary: Project sync must keep the top-level projects page size low enough that Linear accepts the nested project query under its GraphQL complexity cap.
reason: The sync query keeps useful nested project fields such as members, teams, and milestones; asking for 50 projects at once makes Linear reject the request as too complex before any data is returned.
validated_outcome: The offline syncProjects regression test verifies project sync sends first=25 across paginated GraphQL requests.
